title: Entitlements
description: Grant or revoke per-user access to satellite apps. Override default role-based access on a case-by-case basis.

toolbar.appSearchPlaceholder: Filter by app name or description…

emptyUser.title: Select a user to manage entitlements
emptyUser.description: Pick a user from the dropdown above to view and edit their access to satellite apps.

emptyApps.title: No apps match
emptyApps.description: Try adjusting the search or clearing the filter.

actions.blockedTooltip: User role does not meet this app's requirements.

revoke.title: Revoke access to {appName}?
revoke.description: {userName} will lose SSO access to this app immediately. The audit trail of the original grant is preserved. You can grant again later.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
